heading: Kangaroo Inn vs Kanmantoo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kangaroo Inn, South Australia and Kanmantoo, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kanmantoo has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Kangaroo Inn (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kangaroo Inn or Kanmantoo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Inn has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Kanmantoo scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Inn scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Kanmantoo scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kangaroo Inn or Kanmantoo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kanmantoo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
